entries.name: Rolling sea mist
entries.description: Visibility reduced along cliffs and beaches.

entries.name: Warm heavy rain
entries.description: Tracks wash away; sound is muffled.

entries.name: Clear glaring sun
entries.description: Spotting distant ships or birds easier.

entries.name: Strong coastal wind
entries.description: Ranged attacks and flying creatures affected.

entries.name: Thunderheads inland
entries.description: Storm likely if party moves toward jungle.
